title: Open The Door (Selector vs Sequence)
description: The classic teaching example: a selector tries strategies in priority order, and each strategy is a sequence of steps that must all succeed.

custom_nodes.name: IsDoorOpen
custom_nodes.title: Is Door Open?
custom_nodes.description: Succeeds if the door is already open.

custom_nodes.name: WalkThrough
custom_nodes.title: Walk Through Door
custom_nodes.description: Walks the agent through the doorway.

custom_nodes.name: HasKey
custom_nodes.title: Has Key?
custom_nodes.description: Succeeds if the agent carries the door key.

custom_nodes.name: UnlockDoor
custom_nodes.title: Unlock Door
custom_nodes.description: Unlocks the door with the key.

custom_nodes.name: SmashDoor
custom_nodes.title: Smash Door
custom_nodes.description: Breaks the door down as a last resort.

n1.name: Priority
n1.title: Enter The Room
n1.description: Tries the cheapest strategy first, falling back to more drastic ones.
